## What does this PR do?

## Checklist

- [ ] CI is green (lint, format, typecheck, build, tests)
- [ ] Screenshots included for UI changes
- [ ] UI copy checked against the banned-vocabulary list (docs/PRD.md §2) — no _lead, prospect, deal, close, closed-lost, churn, pipeline value, quota_
- [ ] If this touches `schema.prisma`, I reviewed the generated migration SQL for accidental drops of the iron-rule index or CHECK constraints (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
